title: British Lamb Mince Stir Fry
description: A gluten-free, quick, and flavorful stir fry made with British lamb mince.

ingredients.name: British lamb mince
ingredients.notes: Make sure to cook to 63°C for food safety

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Dice the onion and sauté until translucent

ingredients.name: Bell pepper
ingredients.notes: Dice the bell pepper and add to the pan

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic and add to the pan

ingredients.name: Sour cream
ingredients.notes: Stir in sour cream for a creamy sauce

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb mince and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the diced onion, bell pepper, and minced garlic to the pan and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the sour cream and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season the stir fry with salt and pepper to taste.
